description: Continuity and long-session checks for compaction and resumability.

cases.prompt: Force a long session through compaction after an in-flight code change.
assertions: compaction reminder is injected after compaction

cases.prompt: Force two separate sessions through compaction while they each have different in-flight mutations.
assertions: snapshots are written under session-scoped paths
one session's compaction reminder does not overwrite another session's anchor

cases.prompt: Repeat the same no-result search probe several times.
Resume an unfinished task after context compression or restart.
assertions: task state can be recovered from durable records
open questions and pending review status are not lost
